title: sideritis candicans var. stricta
intro: Sideritis candicans var. stricta, also known as white squill or mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the Sideritis genus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and the Balkans. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sideritis candicans var. stricta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems. The plant can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or combining them with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
